import { Callout, Steps } from 'nextra/components'

# External Plugins

External plugins are maintained outside the main Kōji repository and can be used through Kōji's plugin system.

## [`tsp-mt`](https://github.com/TurtIeSocks/tsp-mt)

High-performance multi-threaded TSP solver for geographic coordinates, designed to run as a routing plugin.

- Repository: [github.com/TurtIeSocks/tsp-mt](https://github.com/TurtIeSocks/tsp-mt)

### Setup

<Steps>

#### Clone and build `tsp-mt`:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/TurtIeSocks/tsp-mt.git
cd tsp-mt
cargo build --release --features fetch-lkh
```

#### Copy the built binary into Kōji's routing plugins directory:

```bash
cp target/release/tsp-mt /path/to/Koji/server/algorithms/src/routing/plugins/
```

#### Configure Kōji to use the plugin:

- Set `sort_by` to `tsp-mt`.
- Add any extra CLI flags in `routing_args` as needed.

#### If you did not embed LKH at build time, pass the LKH executable path:

- Example: `routing_args="--lkh-exe /path/to/LKH"`

#

  </Steps>

<Callout type="info">To use it with Dragonite you have to replace the existing `tsp` plugin. Delete the old one and rename `tsp-mt` => `tsp`.</Callout>
